name: AEGIS Guard — AI Agent Defense
description: Enterprise-grade AI agent defense powered by AEGIS PALADIN 6-layer pipeline. Protects against prompt injection, tool chain attacks, memory poisoning, reasoning hijacking, and more.

guardMode.label: Guard Mode
guardMode.help: strict = block aggressively, balanced = default, permissive = warn only

enableInbound.label: Inbound Guard (DPI)
enableInbound.help: Prompt injection detection on incoming messages

enableTool.label: Tool Guard (STAC)
enableTool.help: Tool chain abuse and tool-disguise detection

enableOutput.label: Output Guard (IPI + Safety)
enableOutput.help: Indirect prompt injection in tool output + outbound safety check

enableReasoning.label: Reasoning Guard
enableReasoning.help: Chain-of-Thought hijack and goal substitution detection

enableHeartbeat.label: Heartbeat Anomaly
enableHeartbeat.help: Periodic session anomaly detection via Isolation Forest
